name: ExtensionGenomicStudy_BasedOn
title: R5: Event resources that the genomic study is based on (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `GenomicStudy.basedOn` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`GenomicStudy.basedOn` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/ServiceRequest,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Task)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `GenomicStudy.basedOn` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/ServiceRequest,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Task)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `GenomicStudy.basedOn` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `GenomicStudy` is not mapped.
Element `GenomicStudy.basedOn` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
